module_info.docstring: Tests for shell and Python script validity.

functions.name: _get_shell_scripts
functions.docstring: Get all .sh files in scripts/ and hooks/.

functions.name: _get_hook_entry_points
functions.docstring: Get hook entry-point .sh files (those referenced in hooks.json), excluding lib.sh.

functions.name: test_shell_scripts_syntax
functions.docstring: All .sh files pass bash -n syntax check.

functions.name: test_python_scripts_syntax
functions.docstring: All .py files pass python3 -m py_compile check.

functions.name: test_scripts_have_shebang
functions.docstring: All .sh files start with a shebang line.

functions.name: test_hook_entry_points_have_set_euo_pipefail
functions.docstring: Hook entry-point .sh files contain 'set -euo pipefail'. Excludes lib.sh.
